message:
fix(glamour): mark test-only styles_equal function with #[cfg(test)]

Fixes dead_code warning for the styles_equal helper function which is
only used in tests. The function was left over from the pre-LRU cache
implementation but is still useful for the test_styles_equal test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
